goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel 'doesn't need to have free parking' and should 'include free wifi'.
The hotel should be in the 'west'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the 'north'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '3 people' and '3 nights' starting from 'monday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be in the 'moderate' price range and should be 'in the same area as the hotel'.
The restaurant should serve 'french' food.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'indian' food.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for 'the same group of people' at '13:00' on 'the same day'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant 'by the booked time'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.

book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel doesn't need to have free parking and should include free wifi
The hotel should be in the west
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the north
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 3 people and 3 nights starting from monday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the moderate price range and should be in the same area as the hotel
The restaurant should serve french food
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves indian food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 13:00 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
